allow: Bash(python -m py_compile src/api/auth.py src/app.py src/config.py src/api/__init__.py)

Bash(SECRET_KEY=test_secret_for_import_check python -c "from src.app import app; print\('App imported OK, url_map has', len\(list\(app.url_map.iter_rules\(\)\)\), 'rules'\); print\('Auth routes:'\); [print\(' ', r\) for r in app.url_map.iter_rules\(\) if 'auth' in r.endpoint]")

Bash(AUTH_DISABLED=true python -c "import os; os.environ.pop\('SECRET_KEY', None\); from src.app import app; c = app.test_client\(\); r = c.get\('/dashboard/sandbox', follow_redirects=False\); print\('AUTH_DISABLED: GET /dashboard/sandbox →', r.status_code\)")
Bash(python -c "import ast; ast.parse\(open\('run_local.py', encoding='utf-8'\).read\(\)\); print\('syntax OK'\)")
